Basket Hoop

In Basket Hoop, gravity is your only challenge, and tapping is your sole weapon. Your goal is simple make the ball jump and send it inside the hoop. The charm of the one button games peaks in Basket Hoop online. Make as many baskets as you can in a limited amount of time.

Play Basket Hoop Online

Loading game...
About Basket Hoop

In Basket Hoop, gravity is your only challenge, and tapping is your sole weapon. Your goal is simple make the ball jump and send it inside the hoop. The charm of the one button games peaks in Basket Hoop online. Make as many baskets as you can in a limited amount of time. This browser game page adds original guidance and context so players can understand the challenge before the embedded game loads.

How to Play
  • Press play to load Basket Hoop in your browser.
  • Use the controls shown inside the game.
  • Keep practicing to improve your score and progress.
Game Features
Instant browser play Sports game category Free online gameplay No download required
Frequently Asked Questions

Can I play Basket Hoop for free?

Yes. Basket Hoop is available as a free browser game on ArcadeNest.

Do I need to install Basket Hoop?

No installation is required. The game runs inside the browser iframe.
